description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to 3.x to bring the application to a modern, supported runtime
tasks.requirements: Upgrade from Spring Boot 2.7.18 to Spring Boot 3.x. This upgrade includes migrating from JDK 8 to JDK 17, upgrading Spring Framework from 5.x to 6.x, and migrating all javax.* namespace imports (javax.persistence, javax.validation) to Jakarta EE (jakarta.*). Oracle-specific native SQL queries in PhotoRepository must remain functional. Update Maven compiler settings from Java 8 to Java 17.
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.4 with Java 8 to 17. Migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespace, updated ojdbc8 to ojdbc11, applied Java 17 idioms. All builds pass, all tests pass, no CVEs found. Oracle-specific native SQL queries remain unchanged.

tasks.description: Update the existing Dockerfile to use Java 17+ base images after the Spring Boot 3.x upgrade
tasks.requirements: Update the existing Dockerfile from OpenJDK 8 (maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-8 and eclipse-temurin:8-jre) to Java 17+ base images. Ensure the multi-stage build continues to work correctly with the upgraded application. Update docker-compose.yml if needed.
tasks.taskSummary: Dockerfile was already updated to Java 17+ base images during the Spring Boot upgrade task. Build stage uses maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-17, runtime stage uses eclipse-temurin:17-jre. Multi-stage build structure preserved. docker-compose.yml requires no changes.

tasks.description: Deploy the containerized PhotoAlbum application to Azure Container Apps
tasks.requirements: Deploy the PhotoAlbum application to Azure Container Apps. Create the necessary Azure resources including a Container Apps Environment and Container App. Configure the application with appropriate resource limits and ingress settings for the web application running on port 8080.
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully deployed PhotoAlbum to Azure Container Apps in eastus2. Provisioned Container App, Container Apps Environment, Azure Container Registry, User-Assigned Managed Identity, Log Analytics Workspace, and Application Insights. App accessible at https://azcarcxcvnmqgyxsk.bravepond-d715ed99.eastus2.azurecontainerapps.io. Created Bicep IaC files in infra/, added azure Spring profile with H2 in-memory database (Oracle compatibility mode). Auto-scaling configured 1-3 replicas.
